analysis.root_cause: The agent failed to perform the horizontal reflection (mirroring) required to interpret the clock face correctly before calculating the time.
The agent misread the time from the corrected clock face (read 7:10 instead of 7:50) and performed incorrect arithmetic.
The mirror_flip_tool only performs a horizontal flip, failing to correct the vertical inversion (upside-down orientation) of the clock face.
The agent is struggling to interpret the mirrored clock face correctly after the flip, often misreading the hand positions due to the unconventional layout of the numbers.
